_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: 2.5-fold decrease in Cx3cr1 mRNA in Nf1+/- compared to WT optic nerves at 6 weeks of age
details: Show 2.5-fold decrease in Cx3cr1 mRNA expression in optic nerves at 6 weeks of age compared to WT
